fields.name: FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related fixed asset.

fields.name: Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the fixed asset is being serviced.

fields.name: Maintenance Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor who services the fixed asset for this entry.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies a comment for the service, repairs or maintenance to be performed on the fixed asset.

fields.name: Service Agent Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the service agent who is servicing the fixed asset.

fields.name: Service Agent Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the phone number of the service agent who is servicing the fixed asset.

fields.name: Service Agent Mobile Phone
fields.tooltip: Specifies the mobile phone number of the service agent who is servicing the fixed asset.
